note: Defines the step order for the character creation wizard. Class skill proficiency choices are deferred to Step 5 (after background and species are chosen), so the player can see which proficiencies are already covered before deciding.

steps.label: Choose a Class
steps.description: Select your class. Armor/weapon proficiencies and saving throw proficiencies are locked in immediately. Skill proficiency choices are deferred to Step 5.

steps.label: Choose a Background
steps.description: Select your background. Records the origin feat, 2 skill proficiencies, 1 tool proficiency, ability score boost options, and starting equipment.

steps.label: Choose a Species
steps.description: Select your species. Records traits, size, speed, and any species-granted language or proficiency.

steps.label: Choose Languages
steps.description: Your character knows Common plus 2 additional standard languages of your choice. Some species or classes grant bonus languages automatically.
notes: Druids automatically gain Druidic; it cannot be freely chosen.
Rogues automatically gain Thieves' Cant; it cannot be freely chosen.
Some species (e.g. Elf Trance, Gnome Lineage) may grant additional languages.

steps.label: Choose Class Skill Proficiencies
steps.description: Choose the skill proficiencies granted by your class. Skills already granted by your background are highlighted as already taken; pick from the remaining valid options.
steps.note: Deferred from Step 1 so background and species proficiencies are visible when making this choice.

steps.label: Determine Ability Scores
steps.description: Generate your six ability scores, then apply the +2/+1 or three +1 boosts from your background (no score may exceed 20).

methods.label: Standard Array
methods.description: Assign the values 15, 14, 13, 12, 10, and 8 among your six abilities.

methods.label: Point Buy
methods.description: Spend 27 points. All scores begin at 8. Scores above 13 cost extra.

methods.label: Dice Roll
methods.description: Roll 4d6 and drop the lowest die. Repeat six times. Assign results as desired.

backgroundBoost.description: After assigning scores, apply your background's ability score boosts.
options: Increase one of the background's three listed abilities by 2, and a different listed ability by 1.
Increase all three of the background's listed abilities by 1.

steps.label: Choose an Alignment
steps.description: Choose your character's ethical and moral outlook. Player characters are typically not Evil; check with your DM.

steps.label: Fill in Details
steps.description: Name your character and finalize all remaining choices. Most numeric values are auto-calculated at this stage.

substeps.label: Name & Personal Details
substeps.description: Record your character's name, gender, appearance, personality, and primary goals.

substeps.label: Starting Equipment
substeps.description: Choose between the class+background item bundles or rolling for gold (see your class description for the gold amount).

substeps.label: Choose Spells
substeps.description: If your class grants spellcasting, choose your cantrips and prepared spells.

substeps.label: Auto-Calculated Values
substeps.description: These values are derived automatically from your choices.

values.formula: 10 + DEX modifier (unarmored base; varies by armor/class feature)
linked ability modifier + proficiency bonus (if proficient)

substeps.label: Roll a Trinket (Optional)
substeps.description: Roll 1d100 or pick any entry from the trinkets table for a free Tiny item lightly touched by mystery.

substeps.label: Personality & Appearance Descriptors (Optional)
substeps.description: Roll 1d4 on the tables for your highest and lowest ability scores, and for your alignment, to generate personality and appearance suggestions.
